title: Kylian Mbappé, a leader on a mission, on and off the field
subhead: The captain of the French team, which faces Morocco on Thursday in the quarterfinals, keeps scoring goals while playing an active role behind the scenes. His selflessness stands in stark contrast to the criticisms of his supposed individualism.

subhead: In Turkey, the American president, after criticizing Spain and reiterating his ambitions regarding Greenland, reaffirmed his commitment to the alliance's mutual defense clause and gave Ukraine the green light to produce Patriot missiles under license.

title: Tour de France: Pogacar reclaims yellow jersey with stage 6 win
subhead: Reigning champion Tadej Pogacar broke away 40 kilometers from the finish line and won the stage, claiming a lead of 2 minutes 42 seconds in the general ranking.

title: France or Morocco? The World Cup dilemma for Paris's Moroccan community
subhead: Les Bleus and the Atlas Lions face off on Thursday for a spot in the football tournament's semifinals. In the French capital, some fans have already made their decision. For others, choosing a side is proving far more complicated.

title: Does the decline in reading and the rise of screens signal the end of the democratic era?
subhead: While concerns about the weakening of the mind in the face of new technologies are nothing new, the digital revolution and artificial intelligence now point to a possible end of book civilization.

title: Somaliland's high-risk quest for recognition
subhead: The self-proclaimed republic aspires to accede to the international stage. It finds itself at the center of a game of alliances, caught between Israeli, American and Emirati ambitions and threats from Yemen and neighboring Somalia.

title: Philosopher Mélanie Plouviez: 'The rich are not rich alone; they are in a social world that protects them'
subhead: Wealth is not determined solely by the possessions and assets one accumulates, philosopher Mélanie Plouviez explains in an interview with Le Monde. Since antiquity, a person's fortune has also been defined by one's social standing, relationships of dominance, dependence and honor.
